summary: AnySpot Phase 1 end-to-end test. Backend: 12/12 pytest cases pass (studios list/get, classes filter by category/max_credits/search/time_of_day, studio classes, /me, booking create+credit deduction+spots decrement+duplicate 400, cancel refund+spots restore, 404s). Frontend: Landing, Explore, StudioProfile, Dashboard all render and the full book->cancel flow works (success toasts shown, credits refunded on dashboard). However several spec-required data-testids are missing on Explore (filter-category-*) and StudioProfile (studio-back-btn, studio-schedule), and the header credit pill does not refresh immediately after booking from Explore.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing data-testid for category chips: filter-category-Pilates, filter-category-Yoga, filter-category-HIIT, filter-category-Cycling, filter-category-Strength all not found (count=0). Spec requires these testids.
Missing data-testid='studio-back-btn' on the back button (count=0).
Missing data-testid='studio-schedule' wrapper on schedule section (count=0). Individual schedule-book-{id} buttons are present (30 found).

integration_issues.issue: After clicking book-class-* on Explore page, the header credit-pill text did not update (still showed '22 CREDITS' immediately after success). On Dashboard the credit pill correctly reflects refunds after cancel. Likely Header is reading /me only on mount; needs to refetch or use a shared state after a booking is made on Explore.

action_items: Add data-testid='filter-category-{Pilates|Yoga|HIIT|Cycling|Strength}' to category filter chips in /app/frontend/src/pages/Explore.jsx so Explore filter testids match the spec.
Add data-testid='studio-back-btn' to the back button and data-testid='studio-schedule' to the schedule section in /app/frontend/src/pages/StudioProfile.jsx.
Make the Header credit pill refresh after a booking is made on Explore (e.g., refetch /api/me on booking success or use a global store/event).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: ensure_seed() is good but not idempotent per collection — it short-circuits if any studios exist, so adding new seed studios later requires a manual DB reset. Acceptable for Phase 1.
server.py is single-file (~360 lines) which is fine for Phase 1; consider splitting models/seed/routes if it grows.
Booking endpoints are single-user (hardcoded 'demo-user') as designed for Phase 1. No auth needed yet.
All endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id via projection.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (core flows work; testid gaps + header credit refresh bug)

test_credentials: none (no auth in Phase 1; demo-user is hardcoded)
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 4 studios + classes for 14 days x 3 slots/day on first startup. No additional seed data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully passing. After main agent fixes the three testid gaps and the header credit-pill refresh issue, retest Explore filter-category-* clicks (verify class list filters correctly), confirm studio-back-btn navigates back, and verify credit-pill updates immediately on book from Explore. The booking flow itself (deduct credits + decrement spots + duplicate 400 + cancel refund + spots restored) is fully verified at the API level.
